top_opportunities.thesis: Johnson & Johnson's forward EPS shows significant growth potential, yet the market has reacted negatively.
top_opportunities.trigger_data_point: Forward EPS 12.58 vs trailing 11.04, price reaction only -1.88%
top_opportunities.why_retail_is_missing_this: Retail investors may overlook the strong forward EPS growth in favor of short-term price reactions.
top_opportunities.risk_flags: Market sentiment may remain negative despite strong fundamentals.
